title: Hydrangea borealis
intro:
There is no information about 'Hydrangea borealis'. However, I found information about 'Hydrangea arborescens' and 'Hydrangea officinalis'. 

Hydrangea arborescens, also known as Smooth Hydrangea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Hydrangeaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. The bioactive constituents of Hydrangea arborescens include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins. The most common herbal preparations made with Hydrangea arborescens include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support urinary health and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections.
